svg.title: Automated Bug Checking and Code Generation Workflow
svg.desc: Hourly scheduled workflow that checks Jira for new bugs, marks them in progress, and generates code

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about scheduling options')
g.text: Every 1 hour (cron job or cloud function)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I query Jira API for new bugs?')
g.text: Fetch bugs created in the last 1 hour (status = Open)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I loop through the bugs array?')
g.text: Get bug ID, title, description, assignee

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I update Jira issue status via API?')
sendPrompt('How do I generate code using Claude API?')
g.text: Send bug details → Get code solution/fix

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should I log after completion?')
